title: VGR-DEL-WB-2023-R1 (current)
body: Current live water birth protocol. Water temperature range 36.5-38.0 C, second-stage escalation silent on primiparous cohort. To be superseded by R2 on approval.

title: VGR-DEL-WB-2026-R2 (draft, held for approval)
body: Draft R2 protocol. Two clinical parameter changes. Held for department-head approval on November 27 2026 and Helen's sign-off on the parameter change log.

title: GL-OB-2019-08 - Obstetric water immersion (2017 consensus)
body: Clause 4.2 cites the 2017 European consensus on second-stage water temperature range 36.5-38.0 degrees Celsius. Superseded for the R2 protocol by EL-0134 (2025 systematic review) and EL-0117, EL-0121 (2024 cohorts) - see WBP working group evidence reconciliation CR-001.

title: GL-OB-2021-14 - Perineal trauma reduction interventions
body: Clause 6.1 cites a 2018 review with weaker methodology and smaller sample sizes. Superseded for the R2 protocol by six studies (EL-0072, EL-0088, EL-0110, EL-0119, EL-0126, EL-0139) - see WBP working group evidence reconciliation CR-002.

title: R2 Approval Cover Summary
body: Executive summary carrying the ask, recommendation, evidence posture, cost envelope, and open items. See data/cover_executive_summary.md.

title: R2 Evidence Synthesis
body: Findings across neonatal thermoregulation, neonatal infection 72h, long-horizon neonatal infection (held open), perineal trauma, PPH, and pool hygiene. Six confidence ratings, one insufficient. See data/evidence_synthesis.md.

title: R2 Training Rollout Plan
body: Three cohorts (34 midwives), six modules per cohort, eleven-week window (Jan 12 - Mar 30 2027), go-live Apr 6 2027. See data/training_rollout_plan.md.

title: R2 Equipment Readiness
body: Pool A ready. Pool B conditional pending biomed sign-off Nov 24 2026. Peripheral kit ready with one TROLLEY-02 cradle expected in service Nov 20 2026. See data/equipment_readiness.md.

title: R2 Risk Register
body: Twelve risks across evidence, clinical, operational, equipment, workforce, communications. RR-EV-002 is the held-open long-horizon neonatal infection gap. See data/risk_register.csv.

title: GL-BIOMED-2023-04 - Pool B commissioning
body: Pool B commissioning document. Cites fill-time 22 minutes. Superseded by biomed measurement September 15 2026 at 26 minutes (still within 30-minute operational tolerance). See WBP working group evidence reconciliation CR-007.

title: Delivery Ward salary bands 2026
body: Delivery Ward monthly gross salary bands, effective 2026. Registered Midwife (barnmorska): SEK 38,000 for H. Newton at current step; Team Lead Midwife band from SEK 46,000. Reference only for HR planning. Not part of the water-birth submission workspace.
